notes.basic: Stronger with a token start, turn 4 shop RNG weakness. No heropower requirement.
notes.fast-basic: Stronger with a token start, turn 4 shop RNG weakness. No heropower requirement.
notes.jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the game with its variations.
notes.fast-jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the game with its variations. Pushes levels quickly.
notes.slow-jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the game with its variations. Stays on tier 2 to solidify the board.
notes.warrior: Uma linha altamente valiosa se a economia de nível 1 e os triplos forçados forem fortes.
notes.extended-warrior: Uma linha altamente valiosa se a economia de nível 1 e os triplos forçados forem fortes. Essa variante é uma opção alternativa caso um triplo ainda não tenha aparecido na curva regular do guerreiro.
notes.basic-yogg: Uses a 2-cost heropower to get to tier 3 faster.
notes.aggro-yogg: Uses a 2-cost heropower to get good tier 1s on board before leveling to 3 faster
notes.rafaam: Clean leveling using 1-cost heropower, 2-cost heropower with economy, or tavern tippers
notes.slow-rafaam: Clean leveling using 1-cost heropower, 2-cost heropower with economy, or tavern tippers. Cut off on tier 2 to get stronger
notes.3-on-3: Sacrifices early health to get very fast access to tier 3 minions, then pushes levels
notes.3-on-3-bis: Sacrifices early health to fill the board with tier 3 minions
notes.4-on-4: Sacrifices early health to get very fast access to tier 3 minions. A fallback option in case of a bad shop after 3 on 3; requires economy
notes.toki: Uma maneira de usar os poderes de herói de custo 1 que não proporcionam tempo
notes.pocky: Um uso muito específico para os poderes de herói de custo 1

tips.deck_merge: You can assign a deck as a new version of another one by dragging it on top of the old one
tips.collection_stats: You can see the card history and global stats for the displayed sets, and switch between them at any time
tips.lottery: You can participate in monthly lottery to win premium Firestone subscriptions (enable it from the Settings > General > Lottery page)
tips.achievements_pick_for_me: You can let the app pick 3 achievements to track for you
tips.achievements_pin: Select any number of achievements to track them during gameplay, and see them update them in real time
tips.share_profile_page: Access your own profile page online, and share it with others to show off your achievements and stats
tips.contextual_related_cards: Mouse over certain cards in the tracker to have more info on what they will do
tips.etc_buddies: When playing as E.T.C. Band Manager, you can see all the buddies in the Discover pool
tips.bg_hero_select: You can get stats for each hero, directly on the hero selection screen
tips.bg_wisdomball: You can get advice from some of the best players in the game directly from the overlay and adopt their strategies
tips.bg_tab_key: Press "Tab" to get a quick overview of the progress of all players in the lobby
tips.guess_the_weight: Some cards have contextual help during Discovers
tips.discover_highlight: Mousing over a card while Discovering highlights the relevant information in your deck
tips.minion_play_order: The number at the top of each minion on board gives you the order in which they arrived - which is the order in which Deathrattles resolve
tips.minion_auto_highlight: Some minions are auto-buys with the right hero (like Freedealing Gambler with Patches). Firestone automatically highlights these in the shop for you.
tips.minions_list_by_tribe: You can activate an option to group minions by tribe in the minions list. This also lets you get rid of the tribes widget, which frees some space.
tips.mercs_terasure_highlight: Mousing over a treasure in Mercs highilghts the synergies in your team
tips.quest_stats: See the Quests' average Turns to complete and the Rewards average placement directly in the overlay
tips.constructed_deck_stats_free: Browse the current top decklists for free!
tips.constructed_deck_stats: View detailed card stats (like mulligan and draw winrates), as well as stats for whole archetypes.
tips.tip-0: If you have any feedback, bug or just want to get in touch, please visit us on Discord (link at the top)!
tips.tip-1: Click on the "Help" icon at the top to view the app's latest release notes
tips.tip-2: Click on the "Bug" icon at the top to report a bug or suggest an improvement
tips.tip-3: If you're experiencing big bugs (like collection not synching, tracker not working, etc.), try running the app as Admin.
tips.tip-4: The Settings have lots of customization options, don't hesitate to have a look to enable / disable some features
tips.tip-5: [Mercenaries] See the "Total Coins" column by making the window wider
tips.tip-6: [Mercenaries] Select the "Mercenaries (PvP)" option in Replays to see more details about the Teams in each match
tips.tip-8: [Battlegrounds] See detailed live stats in a match by bringing up the Battlegrounds window with Alt + B
tips.tip-9: [Battlegrounds] Make the BG window wider to see average damage and lethal chances in the simulator
tips.tip-10: [Duels] You can mouse over the Opponent's health to see their max health
tips.tip-11: [Duels] Mousing over your opponent's name also reveals their class

third-party.intro: We believe that your data belongs to you, and that you should be able to synchronize it to other third party websites and help them do whatever they do best with it. We don't get paid for this, but we do get some exposure since they then talk about us :)

vs.pitch: Vicious Syndicate builds a weekly meta report that captures what the meta looks, using both data coming from thousands of games and insights by top-level players. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
vs.next: If you decide to contribute to the vS Data Reaper Report, Firestone will anonymously send them info about your games (mostly the cards played by each player and some meta data, like player ranks).
vs.toggle-label: Contribute to the vS Data Reaper Report

ooc.pitch: Out of Games is a Hearthstone community site with articles, guides, decks, card database, and more. Syncing your card collection to the site makes it easier to find decks to play. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
ooc.next: If you connect your Out of Games account, Firestone will send your collection data to Out of Games so you can use it online.
ooc.toggle-label: Show notification when collection is synchronizeed
ooc.title: Out of Games

hearthpwn.title: Hearthpwn
hearthpwn.pitch: Hearthpwn is one of the biggest community websites that shares decks, articles, and more. Syncing your card collection to the site makes it easier to find decks to play and view stats on your collection. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
hearthpwn.next: If you decide to sync to Hearthpwn, Firestone will send them your collection data, so you can view stats on your collection.

d0nkey.pitch: hsguru.com is a fan website that gathers all decks from official Hearthstone competitions, as well as decks from streamers to allow anyone to easily find interesting decks to play. Synchronizing to hsguru.com will let you share your decks with your audience (if you're a streamer) or will help them build a better database to provide more free services to the community. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
d0nkey.next: If you decide to sync to hsguru.com, Firestone will send them each game you play, which will appear in a specific section on the website (which is still under construction). The replays will be private by default, unless you're streaming at the same time. See the {{link}} for how to set everything up.

hsdecks.pitch: Hearthstone-decks.net shares Decks played at High Legend for all constructed modes, News & Articles. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
hsdecks.next: If you decide to sync to hearthstone-decks.net, Firestone will send them each game you play anonymously with some info about your games (Deck Code, Rank, Game Results)

bug-report.title: Send feedback / Report a bug
bug-report.simulator-bug-text: If you want to report a bug with the simulator (and want to help me as much as possible), please check the how-to
bug-report.general-bug-text: PLEASE: first check the troubleshooting steps
bug-report.message-placeholder: Your message. If you're reporting a bug, please try to describe what you were doing when the bug occurred, and what happened that caused you to report this bug.
bug-report.status-done: Feedback sent. Thank you for reaching out! Stay up-to-date on by joining us on {{discordLink}} or on {{twitterLink}}

twitch.title: Broadcast on Twitch
twitch.intro: Firestone twitch extension allows you to stream while showing your deck tracker in the Twitch player, as well as letting them mouse over all the players in the leaderboard in Battlegrounds. To activate it, you will need to:
twitch.todo-1: 1. Instale a extensão Firestone Twitch em seu canal:
twitch.todo-2: 2. Conecte sua conta do Twitch ao Firestone clicando no botão abaixo
twitch.delay-label-tooltip: Postpone events sent to Twitch by this amount of milliseconds. Useful if your stream is delayed to fight snipers
twitch.appear-on-live-streams-tooltip: Appear on the "Live Streams" tab. This feature, still under development, will list all streamers currently using Firestone as well as their current game type, list (if applicable), and a link to go to their Twitch stream.

discord.activate-custom-in-match-text-tooltip: Customize the text that will appear when users click on your username and you're in a match

in-game-details.text: You can customize the text that is displayed when you are in a match. You can use the following placeholders:
in-game-details.text-2: Need some more placeholder customization? Let me know on {{discordLink}}!

localization.title: Localization
localization.text-1: The translation of the app is done by the community, by people like you who generously put in time and effort to allow everyone to use the app in the language of their choice. As such, please enjoy and respect their work.
localization.text-11: This also means that not every part of the app will be translated into your language. In that case, the missing parts will be displayed in English.
localization.text-2: If you want to help translate the app, please check out the instructions {{link}}.
localization.text-3: Please restart the app (by right-clicking on the Firestone icon in the system tray) to make sure the new language is taken into account.

premium.title: Premium subscription options
premium.text-1: Becoming a Premium user is the best way to support the app and the work I do to improve Firestone. In addition, you get a bunch of features, like Overlay widgets, a website with your own Profile page, and much more. You can find the details of all the premium features {{link}}.
premium.lottery-block-text1: Taking part in the lottery lets you accumulate points by doing some actions while playing games (like spending resources) with the lottery window visible. At the end of every two weeks, 2 winners will be picked at random (the more points you have, the more chances you have to win). The winners will get a 2-month Premium subscription, and will be announced on {{twitterLink}} and {{discordLink}}.
premium.lottery-block-text2: Once a new lottery season starts, points from previous seasons are reset.
premium.lottery-block-text3: Note: if you have multiple screens, try to toggle the "Set Overlay" setting off in the widget, and move it to a second screen.
premium.lottery-block-text4: Note: if you're a Premium user, opting in the lottery WILL NOT show you ads - and if you win, we'll see together for a prize of equivalent value.
premium.lottery-premium-section-tooltip: This section is only available to Premium users

data.remote-intro-text: Firestone stores most of your data online, to make it easy to use it across different computers. Some of that data is cached locally to improve the loading time of the app and reduce the bandwidth usage. You can however force a refresh of that data with the buttons below, typically after you've switched computers.
data.export-settings-button-tooltip: Export your settings to a file, which you can then import on another computer
data.import-settings-button-tooltip: Import your settings from a file, which you might have exported from another computer
data.disable-local-cache-tooltip: Disable the local cache of your games. This will force the app to retrieve all your games from the server, which will slow down the loading of the app a bit. Disabling the local cache will also clear the existing cache.
data.clear-local-cache-tooltip: Clear your full local cache, meaning all the data will be retrieved from the server the next time you start the app. Use this if you've played without Firestone on.
data.total-games: The app has retrieved a total of {{value}} games
data.packs-tooltip: Refresh your packs. This is automatically done every 7 days.
data.games-tooltip: Refresh your games. It will retrieve all your games since you started using the app, and it might take a while
data.clear-games-tooltip: Clear your games, and reload the latest games based on your preferences (last 100 days by default, you can change that by enabling the Advanced Settings). This might be useful if you have a lot of games and feel that the app is using too much RAM

global.show-board-in-separate-zone-tooltip: Move the cards on the board from the "Other" zone to a new "Board" collapsible zone.
global.show-hero-power-in-board-zone: Show hero power in board zone
global.show-hero-power-in-board-zone-tooltip: Show the hero power of the player in the "Board" zone. This helps for dynamic pools display and some highlights.
global.reset-deck-position-after-trade-tooltip: After trading a Tradeable card, that card could in theory be place at the bottom of the deck. So by default, when a Trade happens, the "Top of Deck" and "Bottom of Deck" sections are cleared. Toggle this option off if you want the sections to keep their previous values even after a Trade.
global.show-stats-change-tooltip: Show stats changed for some cards in the decklist (e.g. Ignite, Blacksmithing Hammer)
global.show-cost-reduction-tooltip: Update the mana cost of cards in the deck when their cost has been modified by an effect (e.g. Incanter's Flow)
global.show-unknown-cards-tooltip: Add an "Unknown card" entry in the tracker for cards about which we have no information.
global.highlight-related-cards-tooltip: When active, related cards will be highlighted on your decklist when mousing over specific cards (for instance, mousing over Double Jump in your decklist will highlight all Outcast cards in your deck)
global.discover-help-tooltip: Shows contextual help when Discovering cards. It can range from simply highlighting related cards in your deck to providing more specific information.
global.hand-sort-by-zone-order: Hand / Board sort by zone order
global.hand-sort-by-zone-order-tooltip: Sort the hand and board (when visible) by zone order, so the cards in the hand / board are displayed in the order they appear in-game
global.close-tracker-on-end-tooltip: Automatically close the tracker when the game ends. If disabled, the tracker needs to be closed manually
global.close-tracker-on-end-advanced: Got it, Firestone won't close the tracker when the match ends
global.reset-button-tooltip: Reset the decktracker positions. This can solve an issue where your tracker doesn't show up anymore on screen
global.reset-button-confirmation: Decktracker positions have been reset, and will be applied in your next match.
global.counters-use-expanded-view-tooltip: When applicable, counters tooltips will display items on separate lines

max-resources-widget.title: Max resources widget
max-resources-widget.toggle-tooltip: When your max health / mana changes, shows a widget that displays the maximum resources you can have in a game
max-resources-widget.show-horizontally-tooltip: Show max resources on a single line, instead of a single column
max-resources-widget.always-on-tooltip: Show the widget even when the max health / mana hasn't changed

modes.title: Decktracker is active for the following modes

opponent-deck.show-tracker-tooltip: When active, a tracker will show for your opponent's cards
opponent-deck.ai-decklist-tooltip: When active, the tracker will try to load the decklist of the current AI opponent. Be aware that some decks are pseudo random, so the decklist will often be only indicative
opponent-deck.known-decklist-tooltip: When active, the tracker will try to load the decklist of the current opponent if is a known list at the start of the game (like when playing the Whizbang's Heroes Twist season)
opponent-deck.group-cards-by-zone-tooltip: When active, the tracker will split the cards into collapsable sections (Deck, Hand and Other), which enable some new features. Turn that off to use the Legacy display mode, where all cards are grouped together in a single section
opponent-deck.used-cards-go-to-bottom-tooltip: When active, the cards that have been used are shown at the bottom of the list. It can only be activated if the Group cards by zone option is disabled
opponent-deck.darken-used-cards-tooltip: When active, the cards that have been used are darkened.
opponent-deck.global-effects-tooltip: When active, a new section appears at the top of the tracker that shows global effects affecting the player / deck
opponent-deck.current-effects-tooltip: When active, a new section appears at the top of the tracker that shows current effects affecting the player / deck
opponent-deck.current-effects-use-enchantment-name-too: When active, the name of the enchantment will be used instead of the name of the card
opponent-deck.sort-by-mana-cost-tooltip: When active, the cards will be sorted by mana cost in the Other zone. Otherwise, the zone will first show the cards on the board, then the graveyard, then the others
opponent-deck.show-bottom-cards-separately-tooltip: Show the known cards at the bottom of the deck separately from the main deck
opponent-deck.show-top-cards-separately-tooltip: Show the known cards at the top of the deck separately from the main deck
opponent-deck.hide-generated-cards-tooltip: Hide cards that were created by other cards and that are not in hand or in deck. WARNING: hiding generated cards can cause some features to work in a degraded mode, like card highlights
opponent-deck.show-dk-runes-tooltip: Add a section at the top of the tracker showing the known Death Knights runes in the deck
opponent-deck.card-turn-draw-tooltip: Show the turn at which a card in the opponent's hand was drawn
opponent-deck.guessed-cards-tooltip: Show what card is in the opponent's hand when we know it (after it has been sent back to their hand with a Sap for instance)
opponent-deck.buff-in-hand-tooltip: Show buffs affecting cards in the opponent's hand
opponent-deck.sequence-info-tooltip: For cards that create multiple different cards of hand in your opponent hand, show an indicator to help you identify which is which
opponent-deck.enable-secret-helper-tooltip: When active, a popup with all possible secrets will appear whenever the opponent plays a secret

counters.title: Contadores
counters.galakrond-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has invoked Galakrond (appears only when the opponent plays Galakrond or a card that Invokes Galakrond)
counters.pogo-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has played a Pogo-Hopper
counters.astral-automaton-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has summoned an Astral Automaton
counters.discovers-tooltip: Counts the number of times your opponent has Discovered a card
counters.earthen-golem-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has summoned an Earthen Golem
counters.jade-tooltip: Show the current size of your opponent's Jade Golems
counters.cthun-tooltip: Show the current size of your opponent's C'Thun
counters.fatigue-tooltip: Show your opponent's next fatigue damage
counters.abyssal-curse-tooltip: Show your opponent's highest Abyssal Curse damage
counters.attack-on-board-tooltip: Show the total attack of minions on you opponent's board + their hero
counters.watch-post-tooltip: Show the total number of watch posts they played this match. Shows up only if relevant cards are found in the deck or hand
counters.libram-tooltip: Show the total number of librams they played this match. Shows up only if relevant cards are found in the deck or hand
counters.elwynn-boar-tooltip: Show the number of times an Elwynn Boar died for your opponent
counters.volatile-skeleton-tooltip: Show the number of times a Volatile Skeleton died for your opponent
counters.chaotic-tendril-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent played a Chaotic Tendril
counters.damage-taken-on-your-turn-tooltip: Gives you information on the damage your opponent has taken on their turns (number of times and total damage) when they are playing as {{classes}}
counters.relic-tooltip: Show the power of your opponent's next Demon Hunter Relic
counters.excavate-tooltip: Show your opponent's current and maximum Excavate levels, and show the treasures they can get from their next Excavate tier when mousing over the counter
counters.number-of-spells-tooltip: Show the total number of spells your opponent played this match. Shows up only if they played at least one spell
counters.hero-power-damage-tooltip: Show the total damage done by your opponent's hero power this match. It shows up only if the opponent's class is Mage and they have dealt at least one damage
counters.hero-power-use-tooltip: Show the number of times you have used your hero power
counters.ysondre-tooltip: Show the number of times Ysondre died this game
counters.sea-shanty-tooltip: Shows the number of spells your opponent has cast on characters. Only shows up if opponent is Paladin
counters.holy-spells-tooltip: Show the number of holy spells your opponent has cast. Only shows up if opponent is Paladin
counters.imbue-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has imbued their hero power this game
counters.corpse-spent-tooltip: Show a counter with the total amount of corpses the opponent spent. It appears when the opponent has played one rune of each type, and is likely to have Climactic Nectrotic Explosion.
counters.corpses-tooltip: Show a counter with the current total corpses for the opponent - it appears when you know they have a corpse spending card and the game doesn't show the counter
counters.wheel-of-death-tooltip: After your opponent plays {{cardName}}, shows the number of turns before you die
counters.shockspitter-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has attacked this match. It shows up only if the opponent's class is Hunter and they have attacked at least once
counters.dragons-summoned-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent summoned a Dragon.
counters.dragons-played-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent played a Dragon.  Appears only if the opponent is Priest and played a dragon
counters.dead-minions-this-game-tooltip: Show the number of minions that died this game when your opponent is a Death Knight or they have a relevant card in hand or deck (for instance, Reska the Pit Boss)
counters.elemental-streak-tooltip: Counts how many turns in a row your opponent has played an elemental. Only appears if they played at least 2 elementals in a row.
counters.multicaster-tooltip: Show the spell schools of which your opponent played a spell this game
counters.cards-drawn-tooltip: When your opponent has {{cardName}} in their deck, or if they are {{cardClass}}, show the number of cards they have drawn this game
counters.protoss-spells-tooltip: Show the number of Protoss Spells your opponent has played this game. Shows only if they are Mage and have played at least one Protoss Spell
counters.libram-reduction-tooltip: Show the total cost reduction of your opponent's librams
counters.starships-launched-tooltip: Show the number of Starships your opponent has launched this game and their contents

your-deck.ignore-decklist-tooltip: Don't load the initial decklist and only track played and drawn cards. Changes will be applied for the next game
your-deck.ignore-decklist-confirmation: Got it, the tracker will ignore your decklist
your-deck.discovery-zone-tooltip: When active, a new section appears in the tracker with the Discover options you're being offered. This lets you see related cards and highlight synergies with your deck.

counters.libram-reduction-tooltip: Show the total cost reduction of your librams
counters.imbue-tooltip: Show the number of times you have imbued your hero power this game

counters.outcast-tooltip: Show the number of Outcast cards you've played this game
counters.undead-died-since-last-turn-tooltip: When Discovering a card, if one of them has the "friendly undead died since the end of your last turn" effect, show a counter telling you that the effect will activate
counters.dive-the-golakka-depths-tooltip: Show the number of times you have completed the {{cardName}} quest

counters.next-starship-launch-tooltip: Show the cost reduction of your next Starship launch

counters.chained-guardian-tooltip: Show the number of plagues you shuffled into the opponent's deck

counters.cthun-tooltip: Show the current size of your C'Thun
counters.abyssal-curse-tooltip: Show your highest Abyssal Curse damage
counters.rafaam-time-tooltip: Tracks the Rafaams you've played this game
counters.windrunner-sisters-tooltip: Show which of the Windrunner sisters you have played this game

counters.volatile-skeleton-tooltip: Show the number of times a Volatile Skeleton died for you
counters.relic-tooltip: Show the power of your next Demon Hunter Relic
counters.hero-power-damage-tooltip: Show the total damage done by your hero power this match. Shows up only if Mordresh Fire Eye or Jan'Alai the Dragonhawk are in your deck or hand

counters.tyrande-tooltip: Show the number of spells left that will play twice
counters.damage-taken-on-your-turn-tooltip: Gives you information on the damage your hero has taken on your turns (number of times and total damage) when some cards that make use of this info are in your hand or deck (like Sauna Regular or Party Planner Vona)

counters.cards-played-from-another-class-tooltip: When you have Snatch and Grab in hand or deck, show the number of cards you played from another class

counters.combo-cards-played-tooltip: When you have {{cardName}} in hand/deck, show the number of combo cards you have played this game

counters.overdraft-tooltip: Shows a counter when you have Overdraft in hand or deck that tells you how much damage it will do
counters.overload-this-game-tooltip: Show the number of mana crystals you have overloaded this game
counters.bonelord-frostwhisper-tooltip: After Bonelord Frostwhisper has died, keep track of the number of turns left to live
counters.anachronos-tooltip: After playing Anachronos, keep track of the number of turns left until minions come back
counters.runi-tooltip: Show the cards that will come back after playing {{cardName}}
counters.asvedon-tooltip: When you have Asvedon, the Grandshield in hand, show the last spell that your opponent played
counters.murozond-tooltip: When you have Murozond the Infinite in hand, shows all the cards your opponent played last turn, in the order they were played

counters.gardens-grace-tooltip: Show the actual cost (after reduction) of Garden's Grace cards when you have one in hand or in deck
counters.shockspitter-tooltip: When you have a Shockspitter in deck/hand, shows a widget telling you how much damage it will do next
counters.hero-attacks-tooltip: Show the number of times your hero has attacked this game, if you have cards in hand or deck that can benefit from that information

duels.title: Duel specific options
duels.max-health-tooltip: Choose a way to show the opponent's max health in a Duels match
duels.show-ooc-tracker-tooltip: Adds a decklist while selecting treasures between matches. This lets you see synergies between cards, for instance.
duels.show-ooc-hero-info-tooltip: Shows hero / hero power / signature treasure stats when mousing over the options in-game before starting a Duels run.
duels.show-ooc-deck-select-tooltip: Shows widget on the deck building screen that lets you quickly copy your last deck played with this hero / hero power / signature treasure combination, as well as a couple of recent high-wins decks.

turn-timer.title: Cronômetro de turno
turn-timer.show-turn-timer-tooltip: Show a widget that counts the total time spent in total and in your current turn, as well as gives you an indication of how much time you have left in the round
turn-timer.show-turn-timer-match-length-tooltip: Show the total time elapsed in this match, including mulligan

lobby.title: Lobby tracker
lobby.show-lobby-tracker-tooltip: Show the decklist for the selected, on the deck selection screen

mulligan.show-mulligan-card-impact-tooltip: Show the impact of each card in your hand on your deck's winrate
mulligan.show-mulligan-deck-overview-tooltip: Show an overview of your deck with the Mulligan Impact of each card

general.title: General options
general.show-related-cards-tooltip: When mousing over a card, also show the cards that are related to it (typically, other cards generated by it).
general.remove-duplicate-in-tooltip-tooltip: Only show one copy max of each card when mousing over certain cards in the tracker (e.g. when mousing over a card that lists dead minions)
general.show-transformed-info-tooltip: Show the card that a card was transformed into (e.g. when a card is Polymorphed into a Sheep)
general.selective-notifications-label: You can selectively show some card notifications
general.notifications-rewards-tooltip: Display a notification whenever you get a card outside of a pack, typically end-of-season or Arena rewards

collection.pack-stats-show-only-buyable-packs-toolt: Show only the packs that can be bought in the shop with gold, hiding all promotional / reward packs

duels.hide-stats-below-threshold-tooltip: Hide stats with fewer than {{value}} data points

battlegrounds.full-toggle-tooltip: Turn off to disable all Battlegrounds live features

general.integrated-mode-tooltip: When turned on, the battlegrounds window becomes an overlay, and is bound to the game window. Using this is recommended for single monitor setups, or if you want to stream the app
general.enable-battle-sim-tooltip: When active, you will know your chances to win / tie / lose each battle at the start of the battle
general.hide-simulation-tooltip: When active, simulation results will be hidden once the battle phase ends
general.show-sim-only-in-tavern-tooltip: When active, simulation results will be hidden during the battle, and shown once you get back to the tavern
general.use-remote-simulator-tooltip: Turning that on will run the battle simulations on a remote server, thus freeing your machine up. On the other hand, the results will take a bit longer to arrive
general.show-intermediate-results-tooltip: Show the intermediate results of the battle simulation, showing the odds evolve as the simulation is ongoing
general.popup-hero-selection-screen-tooltip: When active, the hero selection screen, with various stats on each choice, will popup when being offered the initial heroes
general.use-mmr-filter-for-live-stats-tooltip: When active, the hero ratings that are displayed on the Hero Selection screen at the start of a match will take into account your current Rating. WARNING: this may result in a low data sample size
general.use-tribes-filter-for-live-stats-tooltip: When active, the hero ratings that are displayed on the Hero Selection screen at the start of a match will take into account the tribes from the current lobby
general.use-anomaly-filter-for-live-stats-toolti: When active, the hero ratings that are displayed on the Hero Selection screen at the start of a match will take into account active Anomaly. WARNING: this may result in a low data sample size
general.show-next-opponent-recap-tooltip: On the second-screen BG window, shows your next opponent's info at the top in a bigger space, in addition to being in the list with all the others below
general.show-achievements-tooltip: Shows the missing achievements for each hero at the hero selection stage
general.show-hero-tooltip-tooltip: Shows hero stats and strategy tips when mousing over the hero portrait on the game's hero selection screen.
general.show-hero-tier-tooltip: Shows hero tier and global average position directly on the hero portrait during hero selection.
general.show-hero-tips-tooltip: The Wondrous Wisdomball appears and lets you quickly see the pro tips for your current hero by mousing over it.
general.show-trinket-tips-tooltip: Show trinket tips provided by top BG players, both during the trinket selection phase in the overlay (for Premium users) or in the minions list (for everyone).
general.show-quest-stats-tooltip: Show the average turns you need to complete each of the quests being offered, and show the average final placement of players who picked their associated reward. Be sure to consider both when choosing what to pick!
general.show-trinket-stats-tooltip: Show the pick rate and average placement for the trinkets you are offered.
general.show-minions-auto-highlight-tooltip: Automatically highlight some minions in the shop based on your hero or board (for instance, Freedealing Gambler with Patches the Pirate).
general.show-tribes-auto-highlight-tooltip: Automatically highlight some tribes in the shop that you prefentially want to buy with some heroes (like Elementals with Chenvaala).
general.show-overlay-button-tooltip: Shows a button on the overlay to toggle the main window or on off, which you can use instead of the hotkeys
general.popup-post-match-stats-tooltip: When active, the battlegrounds window will be restored after a match to show the post-match stats, even if it was minimized
general.show-game-end-notif-tooltip: Show a small notification at the bottom right of the screen after the game ends to quickly access your game stats
general.simulator-number-of-sims-tooltip: The number of simulations ran for each battle. We found 5,000 simulations to be a pretty good spot. Increasing the number will increase the accuracy of the calculation but will require more resources from your PC.
general.max-sim-duration-tooltip: The maximum time (in milliseconds) the simulation is allowed to run. If after that time it still hasn't reached the maximum number of simulations, it will stop and give you the results it has.

overlay.show-banned-tribes-tooltip: Show what tribes are banned in the current run
overlay.show-available-tribes-tooltip: Show available tribes instead of banned ones

overlay.banned-tribes-single-row-tooltip: Force the tribes to be displayed in a single row, without wrapping
overlay.show-minions-list-tooltip: Show the list of minions, grouped by tavern tier

overlay.last-opponent-board-tooltip: Show the last known opponent's board (and additional info) when mousing over their portrait in the leaderboard
overlay.battle-simulation-tooltip: Show the current battle simulation results as an overlay on top of the game

overlay.banned-tribes-show-in-column-tooltip: Show the banned tribes in the column, instead of the row
overlay.minions-list-show-on-mouse-over-label: Show minions list on mouse over
overlay.minions-list-show-on-mouse-over-tooltip: When deactivated, you will have to click on the tavern tier icons to show the minions list
overlay.minions-list-new-header-tooltip: Use the 2-step navigation menu to reduce the clutter in the minions list
overlay.minions-list-show-on-mouse-over-confirma: Got it, we will only show you the minions details when you click on a star
overlay.minions-list-group-minions-into-tribes-l: Attach minions to main their tribe

overlay.minions-list-show-tier-7-tooltip: Will always show tier 7 minions, even when you're not Thorim.
overlay.minions-list-show-buddies-tooltip: Will always show Buddies, even when you don't currently have a means of getting one.
overlay.minions-list-show-trinkets-tooltip: When trinkets are in the game and "tribe tiers" are activated, show them in the minions list.

overlay.minions-list-show-single-tier-tooltip: Adds a search button that lets you filter all cards by their name/text.
overlay.minions-list-show-tribes-highlight-toolt: Adds buttons to highlight specific tribes or mechanics in Bob's Tavern
overlay.minions-list-show-mechanics-tiers-toolti: Adds columns to the minions list that groups minions by mechanics
overlay.minions-list-show-tribe-tiers-tooltip: Adds columns to the minions list that groups minions by their tribe
overlay.minions-list-show-compositions-tooltip: Adds a tab to the minions list where you can explore the various compositions of the current meta. You need to have the "{{newHeaderOption}}" option toggled on
overlay.minions-list-show-golden-cards-tooltip: Show both the normal and golden version of cards when mousing over the minion
overlay.minions-list-show-spells-at-bottom-toolt: Show the spells at the bottom of the minions list, instead of the top
overlay.minions-list-keep-in-bounds-tooltip: Make sure the list never goes too much out of bounds. Turn this off if you're not able to position the list exactly how you want it

minions-list-compositions.fade-higher-tier-cards-tooltip: Fade out cards of tiers higher than your current tavern tier

overlay.opponent-board-show-top-label: Show at top of the screen
overlay.opponent-board-show-top-tooltip: Toggle to show the opponent board at the top or bottom of the screen

actions-counter.title: APM counter
actions-counter.enable-tooltip: Enable the APM counter. This tracks how many actions you've taken in the current turn as well as your APM (actions per minute)

overlay.counter-soutshsea-tooltip: Display the number of pirates bought this turn (if any) when Southsea Scoundrel is either in the shop or in your hand
overlay.counter-magmaloc-tooltip: Display the total stats your Magmaloc will get at the end of the turn
overlay.counter-blood-gem-tooltip: Display the attack/health buff of your Blood Gems
overlay.counter-beetle-tooltip: Display the attack/health buff of your Beetles
overlay.counter-elemental-buff-tooltip: Display the attack/health additional buff of your Elementals that grant stats
overlay.counter-volumizer-buff-tooltip: Display the attack/health additional buff of your Volumizer
overlay.counter-whelp-buff-tooltip: Display the attack/health additional buff of your Whelps
overlay.counter-elemental-tavern-stats-tooltip: Display the additional attack/health buff for Elementals in the Tavern
overlay.counter-tavern-stats-tooltip: Display the additional attack/health buff for minions in the Tavern
overlay.counter-tavern-spells-buff-tooltip: Display the attack/health additional buff of your Tavern Spells that grant stats
overlay.counter-baller-tooltip: Display the buff of your next Baller
overlay.counter-rightmost-tooltip: Display the buff to the right-most minion in the tavern
overlay.counter-magnetized-tooltip: Display the number of times you've magnetized this game
overlay.counter-free-refresh-tooltip: Display the number of free refreshes you have left
overlay.counter-spells-played-tooltip: Display how many groups of 4 spells you cast, and your current progress towards forming the next group
overlay.counter-undead-army-tooltip: Display the total attack buff of your Undead this game
overlay.counter-deep-blue-tooltip: Display the current buff value of your Deep Blues
overlay.counter-majordomo-tooltip: Display the number of elementals played this turn (if any) when Majordomo Executus is either in the shop, in your warband or in your hand
overlay.counter-gold-delta-tooltip: Display how much gold more/less you'll have next turn after taking into account cards like Careful Investment or Southsea Busker
overlay.counter-lord-of-gains-tooltip: Display how many different spells you've cast this game, as well as the name of these spells
overlay.counter-tuskarr-raider-tooltip: Display how many pirates you've played this game

session-widget.title: Session widget
session-widget.label: Show session widget
session-widget.label-tooltip: Show a recap of your current play session. Useful mostly for streamers
session-widget.show-groups-tooltip: Show a recap of your session matches, grouped by final position.
session-widget.hide-when-friends-list-open: Hide when friends list is open
session-widget.hide-when-friends-list-open-tooltip: Hide the widget when the friends list is open.
session-widget.number-of-matches-tooltip: Maximum number of matches to show when showing match details (most recent is at the top)

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard info in Overlay
leaderboard.text: These settings lets the app pull information from the official leaderboard directly into the overlay, so that you can have access to the other players' Rating information while playing.
leaderboard.text-2: IMPORTANT: You need to mouse over a player first for the app to be able to retrieve its leaderboard information.
leaderboard.text-3: WARNING: the leaderboard only have information about the top players, and we have to do a rough match by name. So if you're using this on low/medium Rating, there is a high probability that you will get incorrect information.
leaderboard.show-in-leaderboard-tooltip: Show the player name and Rating information directly on the ranking tiles in-game
leaderboard.show-in-opponent-recap-tooltip: Show the player name and Rating information alongside the last board information

notifications.title: Update when you see achievements notifications
notifications.achievements-enabled-tooltip: When turned off, the whole achievements tracking system will be deactivated. Keep that off if you don't plan to use Firestone to browse your existing achievements. Requires an app restart.
notifications.achievements-live-tracking-tooltip: Display a widget that shows your current progress towards any number of achievements you want to track. You can select the achievements to track in the Achievements section of the app.
notifications.show-notifications-tooltip: Display a notification whenever you unlock an achievement. Turning this off also turns off in-game achievements tracking for  Hearthstone's native achievements

general.enabled-tooltip: Enable it if you play the Mercenaries mode, keep it disabled otherwise to improve the perfs of the app. Restart the app after changing this setting.
general.player-team-widget-tooltip: Show a recap overlay of all your heroes, abilities and equipment
general.opponent-team-widget-tooltip: Show a recap overlay of all known opponent's heroes, abilities and equipment
general.map-team-widget-tooltip: Show a recap overlay of all your heroes, abilities and equipment on the bounty map. Useful for easily inspecting your team when choosing a path or picking a treasure
general.village-team-widget-tooltip: Show a recap overlay of all your heroes, abilities and equipment on the collection and team select screens
general.action-queue-pve-tooltip: Show an ordered list of all queued actions in PvE encounters
general.action-queue-pvp-tooltip: When active, shows an ordered list of all queued actions in PvP encounters. Because the opponent's actions are hidden until they resolve, this will only show you your own mercenaries' actions
general.role-chart-tooltip: Add a small button below the team widget over which you can mouse over to display a recap of the roles bonus damage triangle
general.tasks-tooltip: Add a small button below the team widget over which you can mouse over to display a recap of all your current tasks. Always hidden in PvP
general.synergies-tooltip: When mousing over an ability or equipment (in the team widget) or a treasure (in the treasure selection screen), highlights all cards in the team widget that have synergies with it
general.turn-counter-battle-tooltip: Show the battle's current turn, as well as the total turns spent on the map (including the current battle)

quests.title: Choose extra spots
quests.explanation: Choose up to 6 mercenaries who will be automatically added to fill the extra spots when building a Tasks Team (taken from left to right).
quests.empty-team: You haven't built a backup team yet.

comps.description: Explore the most successful Battlegrounds compositions, synergies, and strategies to dominate your matches.

cards.description: Analyze Battlegrounds card statistics, tier performance, and discover which cards are shaping the meta.

arena.description: View hero and card stats, as well as successful past decks and more, FOR FREE.

constructed.description: View class, cards and deck stats, for any rank bracket, FOR FREE.

twitch.language-auto-tooltip: Use the langauge from your Twitch preferences
twitch.adaptative-scaling-tooltip: (EXPERIMENTAL) Altere automaticamente o tamanho dos widgets com base no tamanho da janela
twitch.scale-tooltip: Modify the size of the widgets
twitch.card-scale-tooltip: Modify the size of the cards appearing as tooltips
twitch.move-magnifier-icon-on-top-tooltip: Move the opponent's recap icon to the top of the leaderboard
twitch.could-not-log-error-title: We couldn't log you into your Twitch account
twitch.could-not-log-error-text: Please go to the settings and reconnect to your Twitch account
twitch.show-hero-cards-help-tooltip: Show the hero's hero power when mousing over a hero portrait in the leaderboard
twitch.show-related-cards-help-tooltip: When mousing over a card, also show the cards that are related to it (typically, other cards generated by it).
twitch.show-minions-list-tooltip: Show a widget with all minions available in the game. You can see the full card, as well as its golden version, on mouse over
twitch.show-minions-list-golden-cards-tooltip: Shows the golden version of each minion when mousing over the minion's image in the list
twitch.last-board-size-tooltip: Change the size of the opponent recap that appears when mousing over the hero's portrait in the leaderboard.
twitch.hide-battle-odds-in-combat-tooltip: Don't show the battle odds while in combat
twitch.hide-battle-odds-in-tavern-tooltip: Don't show the battle odds while in the tavern (shop phase)
twitch.hide-battle-odds-when-empty-tooltip: Completely hide the battle odds widget when no odds are available, instead of showing empty info
twitch.cards-in-deck-player-tooltip: There are {{cardsInDeck}} cards in your deck and {{cardsInHand}} in your hand
twitch.cards-in-deck-opponent-tooltip: There are {{cardsInDeck}} cards in your opponent's deck and {{cardsInHand}} in their hand
